programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): El Mustang Bullitt
programme.desc: Danny y Báez investigan el robo del famoso coche que se conducía en una película clásica, ahora propiedad de Owen Cairo (Anthony Edwards).

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Héroes olvidados
programme.desc: Cuando Danny y su familia son amenazados por Thomas Wilder (Louis Cancelmi), un asesino en serie que Danny no ha podido detener, la preocupación de Linda se intensifica por el trabajo de su marido y por el estado de su matrimonio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Resistencia
programme.desc: Erin retoma un caso de homicidio estancado y, con la ayuda de Anthony Abetemarco, busca un testigo clave que había desaparecido.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC busca un móvil y un sospechoso cuando las víctimas se encuentran en los inodoros de las paradas de camiones a lo largo de las carreteras en todo el sur.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una chica de 18 años escapa de una casa suburbana donde estuvo cautiva por años con otras dos mujeres, el UAC busca al sospechoso que las secuestró.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: La UAC lleva a cabo una búsqueda en Los Ángeles después de que el equipo descubre imágenes de seguridad que muestran a un sospechoso siendo invitado a las casas de las víctimas.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando Morgan es secuestrado, la UAC se apresura a buscarlo y salvarle la vida.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS entra en acción para encontrar al agresor responsable de matar a golpes a un marine en su propio patio.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo del NCIS se somete a evaluaciones psicológicas obligatorias mientras investiga la muerte de un comandante naval.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Después de que un terrorista suicida intente asesinar al ministro de Defensa de Belgravia, el equipo debe proteger a su hija, que está estudiando en Estados Unidos; Gibbs investiga la muerte de un marine que falleció en el atentado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Las yemas de los dedos y los dientes desmembrados de un marine asesinado se descubren en el bolso robado a un carterista, lo que lanza al NCIS a la misión de encontrar a un asesino a sangre fría.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Las banderas de nuestros padres
programme.desc: Danny es interrogado por el investigador del fiscal de distrito cuando su expareja es acusada de colocar pruebas para cerrar un caso de homicidio.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Maldito
programme.desc: Cuando un mafioso local es asesinado a tiros en su auto, Danny y Báez intentan obtener información del chico de los recados de bajo nivel de la mafia que encuentran atado en el maletero antes de que la pandilla tome represalias.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coordinate a prostitution sting. Officers pull over a vehicle with a missing license plate. Officers stop a woman driving a stolen vehicle.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are involved in a high-speed pursuit of suspected larcenists. Officers order occupants out of a vehicle and immediately give the driver a sobriety test. Officers report to a call of a dispute in a neighborhood.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Three male suspects are apprehended for solicitation. Officers respond to a domestic violence call at a nearby apartment complex. An officer is alarmed when she discovers an older male is the boyfriend of a teenager.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A decoy vehicle is strategically abandoned in a public parking lot. An officer responds to a burglary in progress call at a local tire store. Officers respond to a domestic call at a nearby trailer park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers investigate two vehicles involved in an accident. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a knife. Officers respond to a call involving a man with a gun at a nearby convenience store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A vehicle is caught traveling in the opposite direction. A sting operation is designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics. Officers respond to a shoplifting call at a local thrift store.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers are left to solve the crime after signs of an apparent stabbing. A man loiters in a private park. A driver insists that the car is his - even though he needs a screwdriver to start the ignition and the plates are stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist on a call regarding a fight at a local residence. On a felony stop a juvenile male with a firearm is detained. Officers respond to a report of a man firing a gun in front of his residence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A reverse drug operation, designed to nab suspects who attempt to purchase narcotics from undercover officers, proves successful for officers in both Tampa, FL and Palm Beach County, FL. Officers are in search of a burglary suspect.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The occupants of a car try to conceal their identities. Officers investigate a vehicle lingering near a park known for illicit sexual activity. Officer investigates a robbery claim at a truck stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female assailant attacks a woman after merely bumping into her. A woman is arrested for spilling beer on an unsuspecting cameraman’s expensive equipment. Two intoxicated women are placed under arrest after a physical altercation.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A boyfriend fights a man who’s just groped his girlfriend. Police make several drug related arrests while patrolling the streets of New Orleans on a particularly raucous evening. An adventurous suspect is arrested while scaling down a drainpipe.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A disastrous carjacking results in an arrest. Officers make an arrest in a domestic abuse call involving two women. Officers find drug paraphernalia on a man who’s suspiciously parked in the middle of the street.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers respond to a call reporting an officer involved in a fight. A brazen female driver careens into a ditch after failing to yield. A berserk woman is pulled over for her erratic driving, she is eventually handcuffed but not without a fight.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers question a couple looking to score drugs. Officers respond to a domestic violence call. Officers assist on a shots fired call, in which the suspect asserts that the weapon went off “accidentally”

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A bloodied man prowls around an apartment complex. Officers pull over a suspicious vehicle and seize drugs belonging to a passenger who is arrested. Police seize drugs and a large knife from a bicyclist.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a high-speed chase with a motorcycle going 100mph. A Florida man becomes verbally abusive with a woman and her mother. Police arrest a man who is pulled over for expired tags and end up seizing a rifle and 20 rounds of ammo.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police use footage to make an arrest for burglary, battery and resisting arrest. Police respond to a disturbance call and officers attempt to help the two neighbors reconcile their differences. Officers arrest a woman for domestic violence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An inebriated man is arrested after getting caught peering through the window of a recovery center. After a foot chase officers bring down a well-known local felon. Police respond to a domestic dispute at a local mobile home park.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is arrested for stealing a large amount of copper wire from a business owner. A young man on a bicycle is charged with possession of drug paraphernalia and public intoxication. A man whose tags expired by a few years is pulled over.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers assist in rescuing a man from a rushing river. A suspect taunts officers during a slow speed chase. Officers assist a rescue team with the extraction of a man from his vehicle after a car wreck. An officer spots an apartment fire.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An officer spots a suspect returning to an area to pick up a hidden stash of narcotics. An officer learns that occupants of a suspicious vehicle has outstanding warrants. A domestic battery is investigated and justice is served.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers coax a man off a large construction crane. An inebriated male suspect is jailed after an officer deduces that he had been abusive toward his girlfriend. A man is rescued from a flash flood, but his truck isn’t so lucky.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A dangerous high-speed pursuit quickly comes to a head after the driver loses control. In Florida a man is pulled over in a stolen vehicle and asserts the car belongs to his parents. Arrests are made in a Florida prostitute sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An arrest is made in a notorious New Jersey drug hotbed. Officers find a suspect hidden under a mattress. A bicycle thief is caught red handed.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect attempts to discard drugs during a foot chase. A man fails to pull over for minor infraction and then bails out his car on foot. A man is arrested after being spotted in a drug transaction.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a couple during an argument over who the narcotics belong to. Police seize a large bag of marijuana after a routine stop. A man is caught harboring drugs under his tongue during questioning.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A legendary comic from the good old days of Las Vegas is set to reunite with his partner on stage for one night only, until one half of the famous duo is found dead.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A mother thought to be grieving for the loss of her family three years ago becomes a suspect in a CSI investigation.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI team must investigate one of their own when Langston is accused by a former colleague of being part of the Dr. Jekyll murders, on part one of a two-part season finale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSI's lives are on the line as they close in on the elusive Dr. Jekyll, and more than one member of the team may not live to see his capture.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston fights for his life after being stabbed by psychopath Nate Haskell, while the other CSIs attend a funeral that turns deadly.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Hysteria ensues when a shark attacks a woman in the pool at a Las Vegas casino "day club," and the CSIs must determine if the killer is human or shark.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A vampire and werewolf convention is at the heart of a murder investigation in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sqweegel, a serial killer who is punishing local heroes that harbor hidden secrets, is on the hunt in Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A woman who suffers from a condition called "hoarding" becomes a murder suspect when a dead body is found buried under piles of trash and debris inside her home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When a college student ends up dead after a "Walking with Dinosaurs" show, the CSIs must determine if his death was murder or accidental.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: When the CSI team discovers the shredded remains of a man, they find themselves with multiple suspects who may be responsible for his death.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Two men are murdered right before exposing a natural gas company for poisoning residents in a farming town, and the CSIs must discover who is responsible for their deaths.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A man's fatal fall from a hotel balcony launches the CSIs into an investigation to determine if his death was suicide or the result of foul play.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs set out to track down a pedophile suspected of murdering an FBI agent's wife and kidnapping his children.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo se une a David Phillips en su reunión de la escuela secundaria cuando descubre que la reina del baile ha sido asesinada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI encuentra un cuerpo cerca de una reserva forestal, descubren lo que podría ser un asesino en serie y su extraña guarida.

programme.desc: Joanna fires up the grill to prepare some of her most flavorful recipes.

programme.desc: Chef Andrew Zimmern teaches Joanna how to make his grandma's meatloaf.

programme.desc: Joanna whips up one of her favorite meals for fun busy weekends.

programme.title: Magnolia Table with Joanna Gaines
programme.desc: Chef Katie Button teaches Joanna how to make some Spanish dishes.

programme.title: Las estafadoras
programme.desc: Una mujer y su hija son estafadoras profesionales que utilizan sus armas de seducción para engañar a millonarios, hasta que la joven hija se enamora poniendo en apuros el último golpe: un excéntrico magnate del tabaco.

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: 10 años
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos se reencuentran en la reunión de alumnos de su secundaria. Cada uno tiene una historia increíble para contar.

programme.title: Dos vidas contigo
programme.desc: ¿Quién sabía que cuando pidiera el especial, recibiría el plato de su vida? David Duchovny y Minnie Driver encienden chispas en esta historia afectuosa sobre un viudo y una camarera que parecían estar destinados a conocerse y enamorarse.

programme.title: El juego del amor
programme.desc: La ciudad de Oregon es el escenario de este cuento de gente hipnotizada por el hechizo del amor. Del romántico Bradley (Greg Kinnear) a Harry (Morgan Freeman), un maestro con sabiduría y experiencia para orientar a los que le rodean.

programme.title: Cosas te tíos
programme.desc: Jason Lee interpreta a un ejecutivo en la ciudad de Seattle que se va a casar con la hija de su jefe (Selma Blair). Su vida se convierte en una pesadilla cuando no se acuerda si la engañó durante su despedida de soltero.

programme.title: 10 años
programme.desc: Un grupo de amigos se reencuentran en la reunión de alumnos de su secundaria. Cada uno tiene una historia increíble para contar.

programme.title: Traficantes de pánico
programme.desc: En su huida, unos delincuentes acorralados por la policía, se esconden en la propiedad de un rico industrial, tomando como rehenes a él y a toda su familia.

programme.title: El Norteño Enamorado
programme.desc: Una ataviada historia que entreteje la opulencia de un hacendado, la codicia y envidia de quien quiere arrebatarle sus propiedades y en medio, las víctimas junto con quienes vienen a exigir justicia.

programme.title: Nobleza ranchera
programme.desc: Don Fernando regresa de la capital con sus dos hijas. Pronto se desatará una tragedia en su propio rancho, cuando ellas se disputen el amor de Luis.

programme.title: México de noche
programme.desc: Julio, ignorando el tratado de paz de su padre con su enemigo, el gánster Arturo, empieza a operar en su territorio, sin imaginar las fatales consecuencias de sus provocadores actos.

programme.title: Acá las tortas (Los hijos de los ricos)
programme.desc: Don Chente y Dolores son un matrimonio que dirige una modesta pero exitosa tortería. Cuando sus hijos regresan tras terminar sus estudios en el extranjero, deberán lidiar con sus refinados gustos y constantes solicitudes económicas.

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito vs los monstruos
programme.desc: Chabelo y Pepito van de excursión con un grupo de scouts y se enfrentan al peligro en una cueva maldita. La aventura comienza cuando encuentran a varios monstruos y deciden destruirlos.

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito detectives
programme.desc: Un comandante amigo de Chabelo y Pepito les pide que lo ayuden a descubrir una banda que rapta niños. Ellos aceptan y se infiltran en la banda para descubrir que los villanos son seres de otro planeta

programme.title: Chabelo y Pepito en la lámpara maravillosa
programme.desc: Pepito descubre que el objeto que compró es una lámpara maravillosa, y pide toda clase de deseos. Pero ahora que su padrastro lo sabe y la quiere ocupar para hacer el mal, debe evitar que lo consiga.

programme.title: El rostro oscuro de la ley
programme.desc: “Del autor de Training Day”, llega este excelente drama sobre policías corruptos, ambientado en los días previos a los disturbios en la ciudad de Los Ángeles.

programme.title: Ruta 666
programme.desc: Route 666 is the thrilling story of a Federal agent whose pursuit of an escaped witness brings him directly in contact with a highway haunted by a treacherous past.

programme.title: Arcángel
programme.desc: Fluke intenta averiguar más sobre el diario faltante, pero su investigación se suspende.

programme.title: Atraco 88
programme.desc: Una mente criminal decide hacer un último trabajo antes de ir a la cárcel y recluta a un grupo de jóvenes empleados del banco para robar 80 millones de dólares en un asalto audaz y descarado al sistema bancario estadounidense. Inspirado por hechos reales.

programme.title: Justicia verdadera
programme.desc: El pasado de operaciones encubiertas de Kane está generando incertidumbre en el futuro del equipo SIU mientras tiene que lidiar con un violador en serie que anda suelto y tiene como objetivo a las líderes femeninas de la comunidad.

programme.title: Justicia verdadera
programme.desc: Un grupo de rusos de alta alcurnia ha llegado al puerto de Seattle con un nuevo mercado negro de diamantes. Las luchas internas de la mafia revelan dos crímenes que el equipo de Kane intentaba identificar.

programme.title: Tierra de policias
programme.desc: El director de Ford vs. Ferrari junta a un elenco de estrellas que incluye a Robert De Niro, Sylvester Stallone, Ray Liotta y Harvey Keitel en este tenso thriller lleno de acción y crimen.

programme.title: Ladrón
programme.desc: Michael Mann (Hunter) dirige este elegante drama cargado de acción protagonizado por James Caan (Misery), un ladrón de cajas fuertes que planea su último golpe por el bien de una mujer, Tuesday Weld (Nieve que quema), y para empezar de cero.

programme.title: Estallido mortal
programme.desc: Mientras graba sonidos en exteriores, un técnico de efectos sonoros (John Travolta) captura el mortal accidente de un candidato a la presidencia. Pero, ¿el sonido que oyó fue el estallido de un neumático o el disparo de un asesino?

programme.title: Vidas al límite
programme.desc: Frank es un paramédico que está al borde de la locura por tantos años de salvar y perder vidas. Una noche, Frank conoce a Mary Burke, la hija de un hombre a quien Frank intentó salvar. Juntos, Frank y Mary enfrentarán a los fantasmas del pasado.

programme.title: Arcángel
programme.desc: El profesor Fluke Kelso se encuentra con un misterioso anciano vinculado a Joseph Stalin.

programme.title: Leyendas de vida
programme.desc: La leyenda de Bagger Vance cuenta la historia de Rannulph Junuh. Su encuentro con Bagger Vance, que se convierte en algo más que un entrenador, llegando a ser un verdadero life coach, es clave para recuperar la confianza en sus capacidades.

programme.title: Tan distinto como yo
programme.desc: Del éxito de ventas del NY Times llega una historia inspiradora y verdadera sobre dos hombres de orígenes radicalmente opuestos, que desarrollan un sorprendente vínculo que los llevará al viaje más notable de sus vidas y forjará una amistad eterna.

programme.title: Entrega mortal
programme.desc: Un sargento del ejército tiene la misión de llevar a un prisionero desde Berlín a Washington. Cuando este último escapa, el sargento se ve envuelto en medio de una conspiración para deshacerse de él.

programme.title: El último castillo
programme.desc: Sus servicios al país lo hicieron un héroe pero un error lo convirtió en prisionero. Para el General Eugene Irwin (Robert Redford) es solo cuestión de cumplir su sentencia, hasta que descubre que otros presos están siendo asesinados.

programme.title: Del crepúsculo al amanecer
programme.desc: En este clásico de Tarantino, los bandidos hermanos Gecko ¡cometen una ola de crímenes! Secuestran a un padre y sus dos hijos, y se esconden en un bar mexicano. Pero se enfrentarán a los clientes del bar y se unirán a sus rehenes para sobrevivir.

programme.title: Contrarreloj
programme.desc: Un ex ladrón busca desesperadamente a su hija que ha sido secuestrada y encerrada en el maletero de un taxi. Protagonizada por Nicolas Cage y Malin Akerman.

programme.title: Instinto predador
programme.desc: Un cazador (Nicolas Cage) debe luchar por su vida en un barco cuando sus mortíferos animales -entre ellos un raro jaguar blanco- son soltados por un peligroso criminal que quiere matar a todos a bordo.

programme.title: Caza Terrorista
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage enciende un barril de pólvora de acción mientras un veterano agente de la CIA va a la caza de su némesis, un terrorista mortal.

programme.title: El gringo
programme.desc: "El hombre" cruza a México con $2,000,000 en efectivo y un plan para vivir lo que le queda en la playa, pero se queda atrapado en el pueblo "El Fronteras". Bajo ataque de policías corruptos, debe salvar "El Fronteras" a través de espectaculares tiroteos.

programme.title: Aguas profundas
programme.desc: Kate (Halle Berry) acepta la lucrativa oportunidad de guiar a un empresario millonario en busca de emociones, por medio del buceo con tiburones en las más peligrosas aguas... fuera de la jaula.

programme.title: Control total
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf y Michelle Monaghan protagonizan esta historia como dos extraños que tratan de escapar del peligro, cuando son arrancados de sus vidas normales y 'activados' en un complot de asesinado de alta tecnología.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: La granja
programme.desc: ¡Salvaje, absurda y divertida, una pandilla de bromistas animados que hacen reír a todos!

programme.title: Un gallo con muchos huevos
programme.desc: Cuando su hogar se ve amenazado por un malvado granjero, un pequeño gallo viene al rescate. En esta excelente película animada de larga duración, la cual garantiza hacer reír a toda la familia.

programme.title: Monster Trucks
programme.desc: Cuando Tripp descubre a una criatura llamada Creech que consume mucha gasolina, un dúo poco probable se une para una aventura divertida, graciosa y sincera, en un Monster Truck súper poderoso para reunir a Creech con su familia.

programme.title: Sahara
programme.desc: Dos aventureros ávidos de emociones se cruzan con una hermosa doctora y van en busca del mayor tesoro, que se cobra las vidas de todos los que lo buscan.

programme.title: Héroes
programme.desc: Dos jóvenes estadounidenses con habilidades especiales deben apurarse para encontrar a una chica en Hong Kong antes de que lo haga una sombría organización gubernamental llamada División.

programme.title: SUNDOWN
programme.desc: En esta comedia hilarante y llena de acción, los mejores amigos Logan y Blake viajan a la destinación exótica de Puerto Vallarta para las vacaciones de primavera. Allí van a encontrar un paraíso de tequila con grandes problemas.

programme.title: Un crucero de locura
programme.desc: Un joven comediante en apuros toma un trabajo simple en un crucero, donde espera tener su gran oportunidad para triunfar en el mundo de la comedia en cruceros.

programme.title: El gran Pee-Wee
programme.desc: Pee-Wee Herman es un simple granjero en un pueblito. Pero pronto una gran tormenta arrasa con todo. Y llega un circo a la granja de Pee Wee quien los deja quedarse un tiempo. El circo decide poner un espectáculo con una estrella adorable, ¡Pee-Wee!

programme.title: Los reyes pal palacio
programme.desc: Momentos divertidos al lado de los talentosos Miguel Céspedes y Raymond Pozo, con más de 600 programas de televisión producidos y viendo la sonrisa de la gente de manera directa en los espectáculos que han realizado en vivo.

programme.title: Guerra de papás
programme.desc: ¡Will Ferrell y Mark Wahlberg frente a frente en este enfrentamiento entre papá y padrastro! Brad (Ferrell) quiere ser el mejor padrastro para los hijos de su nueva esposa.

programme.title: Último viaje a Las Vegas
programme.desc: Cuatro mejores amigos de toda la vida van a Las Vegas para dejar de portarse como adultos de su edad y revivir sus días de gloria. Al llegar, se dan cuenta de que las décadas transformaron Sin City y pusieron a prueba su amistad de manera impensada.

programme.title: Norbit (ESP)
programme.desc: Murphy protagoniza a un Norbit apacible, que recibe una segunda oportunidad con el amor de su infancia, Kate. Sin embargo, los obstáculos podrían complicar este romance más de lo esperado.

programme.title: Canela (LAS)
programme.desc: Restaurant owner Tere has fallen into a state of depression after the tragic death of her daughter. With her eatery facing crisis, granddaughter Maria steps in to help Tere rediscover her love of good food and save the business from disarray.

programme.title: El que busca encuentra
programme.desc: Esperanza y Marcos son dos personas que creen en el destino y en el amor verdadero.

programme.title: Una noche sin luna
programme.desc: Durante la víspera del Año Nuevo, tres personajes solitarios viajan a una pequeña ciudad perdida en el campo uruguayo y, a través de sus caminos, tendrán la oportunidad de cambiar sus destinos.

programme.title: La vida útil
programme.desc: Un empleado de cine se ajusta a su nueva vida después de que el cine en el que trabajó por más de 25 años se ve obligado a cerrar. Subtitulada.

programme.title: Ya veremos
programme.desc: Los padres de Santi están divorciados, y él está acostumbrado a vivir con ellos pero por separado. Tras una urgente cirugía para salvar su vista, Santi decide hacer una lista de deseos por cumplir pero con sus padres unidos.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: Cine en español
programme.desc: no info available

programme.title: Hazlo como hombre
programme.desc: Mauricio Ochmann y Aislinn Derbez protagonizan esta divertidísima comedia sobre un hombre cuyo mundo se pone patas arriba cuando su mejor amigo - y futuro cuñado - le anuncia que es gay.

programme.title: La vela de Navidad
programme.desc: En Gladsbury, hay una leyenda que dice que cada 25 años un ángel los visita para tocar una vela en la víspera de la Navidad y conceder un milagro a quien la prenda. Pero esto podría cambiar tras la llegada de un joven sacerdote.

programme.title: Una navidad perfecta para Carol
programme.desc: Cuando una pastelera independiente acepta acompañar al hombre de sus sueños a casa por las fiestas, las cosas se complican rápidamente al verse atrapada en una lucha de poder con la dominante madre de él.

programme.title: Días de Navidad
programme.desc: Mientras Phoebe busca una nueva tradición para animar sus vacaciones, se da cuenta de que no son las tradiciones las que apreciamos, sino las personas con quienes las compartimos.

programme.title: Navidad a la Carte
programme.desc: Cuando la periodista Carly tiene la oportunidad de participar en su propio programa, nada sale según lo planeado. La envían a Angel Heights para ayudar al chef Grant a reabrir su restaurante familial y filmarlo como piloto especial navideño de televisión.

programme.title: Navidad epoca para amar
programme.desc: Una escritora de romances, famosa por sus obras ambientadas en navidad, queda varada por la nieve en Cranberry Falls, donde queda involucrada en un triángulo amoroso entre un amor de su niñez y el periodista que busca entrevistarla.

programme.title: Una navidad perfecta para Carol
programme.desc: Cuando una pastelera independiente acepta acompañar al hombre de sus sueños a casa por las fiestas, las cosas se complican rápidamente al verse atrapada en una lucha de poder con la dominante madre de él.

programme.title: Días de Navidad
programme.desc: Mientras Phoebe busca una nueva tradición para animar sus vacaciones, se da cuenta de que no son las tradiciones las que apreciamos, sino las personas con quienes las compartimos.

programme.title: La casa del demonio
programme.desc: Desesperada por dinero fácil, la estudiante de segundo año Samantha Hughes (Jocelin Donahue) acepta trabajar como niñera en la apartada mansión de la extraña familia Ulman.

programme.title: Presencias del más allá
programme.desc: Tras más de cien años en actividad, la posada Yankee Pedlar Inn está por cerrar sus puertas. Los empleados que quedan están decididos a demostrar que se trata de uno de los hoteles más embrujados de Nueva Inglaterra.

programme.title: Stephen King: la bala de plata
programme.desc: En esta película de terror, basada en la novela Ciclo del hombre lobo, de Stephen King. Un hombre lobo está aterrorizando a un pequeño pueblo y depende de un niño discapacitado, Marty Coslaw, y su tío para liberar la ciudad de su bestial amenaza.

programme.title: Perfidia
programme.desc: Una pieza de humor inquietante, críptica y etérea que mantiene hábilmente un aura de temor y tensión en todo momento.

programme.title: Ocho días de terror
programme.desc: Un misterioso cometa pasa por la Tierra, dando a las máquinas de todo el mundo una mente asesina propia.

programme.title: Jessabelle
programme.desc: Una chica se enfrenta cara a cara con un espíritu que, después de mucho tiempo de tormento, ha estado buscando su regreso.

programme.title: La Dama De Negro
programme.desc: Arthur Kipps (Daniel Radcliff), un abogado viudo, debe ir a un pueblo remoto a resolver los asuntos de un excéntrico recién fallecido. Pero al llegar, descubre que todos en el pueblo ocultan un secreto mortal.

programme.title: La reliquia
programme.desc: Entren, si se atreven. La gala inaugural de una nueva exhibición en el museo de historia natural de Chicago está por comenzar. Pero tengan cuidado porque algo aterrador quiere asegurarse de que nadie pueda irse.

programme.title: Along Came Jones
programme.desc: Gary Cooper gives a marvelous, tongue-in-cheek performance as a fumble-fingered cowpoke who is mistaken for a notorious bandit and almost gets killed by both sides of the law...all while managing to capture the attention of Loretta Young.

programme.title: Pack Train
programme.desc: Gene Autry sets out to aid frontier settlers, threatened by a shortage of food and medicine. When storekeepers divert the supplies to gold miners, Gene and Smiley Burnette must ride to the rescue.

programme.title: On Top Of Old Smoky
programme.desc: Gene Autry, who is mistaken for a Texas Ranger, helps the owner of a toll road, while she is being pressured by bad characters to relinquish her property, which contains valuable mica deposits.

programme.title: Last Of The Pony Riders
programme.desc: Gene Autry tries to set up a stage line to carry government mail. Schemers try to get the government assignment for their own stage line, and plan to discredit the Pony Express by causing accidents.

programme.title: Daniel Boone
programme.desc: In 1775, Daniel Boone leads thirty colonial families to Kentucky, where they face the threats of Native American marauders led by rebel Simon Girty.

programme.title: A Fistful Of Dynamite
programme.desc: The results are explosive when an Irish terrorist (James Coburn) with a dynamite obsession teams up with a Mexican peasant-turned- revolutionary (Rod Steiger) in this action-packed tale of power and politics. Directed by the legendary Sergio Leone.

programme.title: Doc
programme.desc: Stacy Keach, Haris Yulin, and Faye Dunaway give riveting performances in this controversial and myth-shattering reexamination of the darker side of gunslinger Doc Holliday and the actions that led to the infamous showdown in Tombstone, Arizona.

programme.title: Fort Yuma
programme.desc: When a revered Apache chief is brutally murdered en route to Fort Yuma to negotiate a peace treaty, all-out war erupts in this rousing -- and surprisingly touching -- western starring Peter Graves and directed by the legendary Lesley Selander.

programme.title: Beach Blanket Bingo
programme.desc: When a publicity stunt to promote the singing career of Sugar Kane (Linda Evans) balloons out of control, Frankie (Frankie Avalon), Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) and the gang are pulled into the ensuing comic adventures.

programme.title: How to Stuff a Wild Bikini
programme.desc: While stationed in Tahiti, Frankie (Frankie Avalon) learns he’s in danger of losing Dee Dee (Annette Funicello) to another guy! That is, until a wacky witch doctor (Buster Keaton) conjures up a gorgeous bikini-clad vixen...whom no man can resist!

programme.title: Stella Dallas
programme.desc: A working-class woman is willing to do whatever it takes to give her daughter a socially promising future.

programme.title: Ace in the Hole
programme.desc: A cave collapse traps a man, and all eyes turn toward the tragedy, including those of Charles "Chuck" Tatum (Kirk Douglas), a washed-up newspaper reporter who sees the incident as a ticket back to his former days at the top of the journalism heap.

programme.title: The Train
programme.desc: Screen greats Burt Lancaster, Paul Scofield and Jeanne Moreau star in this suspense-laden tale of justice and retribution as a French Resistance fighter (Lancaster) attempts to stop a Nazi commander from looting the art treasures of Paris.

programme.title: Henry V
programme.desc: In the midst of the Hundred Years' War, the young King Henry V of England embarks on the conquest of France in 1415.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: After some wheeling and dealing and mending a rift between Mr. Kimball and his mother, Oliver (Eddie Albert) finally has a phone installed, but the Hooterville Phone Company installs it directly outside his bedroom window...on top of the phone pole.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: Oliver (Eddie Albert) plants his entire 160 acres with wheat, only to hear from The Crabwell Corners Conservation and Stabilization Committee, a local farm organization, that he was only permitted to grow eight acres of wheat…because of Mr. Haney.

programme.title: Green Acres
programme.desc: It's the Douglases' wedding anniversary and, after initially pretending not to remember, Oliver (Eddie Albert) makes clear that he knows the date very well…he just can't remember exactly how many years he and Lisa (Eva Gabor) have been married.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Maude and Vivian go back to college for their thirty-year reunion, Vivian wants to go back in time and do it all over again -- this time without her husband Arthur.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Carol's beguiling ex-husband suddenly turns on the charm and captivates the Findlay household, Maude and Carol are astounded to discover his motives.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Arthur is determined to teach his visiting grandson the important things in life, but it's the guilty grandpa who learns the most valuable lesson of all.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: When Victoria Butterfield's self-righteous father comes to take her away from the 'permissive' Findlay household, Maude confronts him with his less-than-honorable secret. Roscoe Lee Browne returns in the guest star role of Mr. Butterfield.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude's grandson Phillip is devastated when he finally finds out the real reason why an 'older woman' has been dating him.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude plans a dinner party for her friend, U.S. Congresswoman MacIlhaney, and then plans a new job as her assistant. But Maude could never plan on what's yet to come in the first episode of a three-part story.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Maude mourns the moving of her dearest friends the Harmons until the death of someone close has a drastic effect on her mood...and her life...on the second of a three-part episode.

programme.title: Maude
programme.desc: Sparks start flying when the newly appointed U.S. Congresswoman Maude Findlay arrives in Washington D.C., throwing a monkey wrench into the political machinery by insisting upon doing things her way.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Hilarious sparks fly when Tony tries to fix up his divorced sister with Alex. Instead, she ends up falling for Reverend Jim and Tony goes outrageously overboard trying to break up the affair.

programme.title: Taxi
programme.desc: Lecherous Louie the dispatcher has the dubious honor of being selected by his employer’s revenge-seeking wife to be her clandestine lover, and comedic panic grips the love lair when the boss shows up unexpectedly.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una pequeña niña se enfermó y murió, los investigadores se vieron sorprendidos. ¿Fue un accidente, una enfermedad inexplicable o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1984, el cuerpo de la universitaria Laura Salmon fue encontrado en una granja de Tennessee, cubierto con sus propios jeans y los jeans del asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2004, la estudiante de enfermería Tamika Huston desapareció de su hogar en Spartanburg, Carolina del Sur. Una pista llevó a los detectives a su auto y encontraron una llave de una casa desconocida que podría ayudar a resolver el caso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores no saben por qué un científico joven se ha enfermado muy gravemente. Cuando las pruebas revelan finalmente la causa, es muy tarde para salvarlo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Placas y mentiras
programme.desc: Un estudiante universitario fue encontrado muerto y la evidencia sugirió que conocía a su asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Durante siete años, un trío de hombres robó un banco tras otro. Siempre se escapaban antes de que llegara la policía y no dejaban pruebas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1991, Pearl Smith, residente de Maine, desaparece después de una discusión con su esposo, Bill Bruns. Los investigadores encuentran un rastro de sangre que conduce al sótano de la pareja.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La investigación sobre una estudiante universitaria desaparecida lleva a la policía a descubrir que, sin que sus amigos lo supieran, vivía una extraña doble vida, asistía a la escuela de día y trabajaba como prostituta de noche.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, Denise O'Neill, una mesera de Palm Beach, es secuestrada y asesinada. Su vecino, Luis Caballero, levanta sospechas por su comportamiento extraño hacia los equipos de TV que cubren el crimen.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una mujer desaparece y su esposo se convierte en el principal sospechoso – especialmente después de que la policía encuentra una gran mancha de sangre en la alfombra de su habitación.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Uno para llevar
programme.desc: Una pareja casada decidió escapar del frío del invierno con unas minivacaciones en Key West.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1999, Valiree Jackson, de 9 años, desapareció camino a la escuela cerca de Spokane. Su padre, Brad Jackson, denunció la desaparición y toda la comunidad comenzó a buscar a su secuestrador.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La víctima había ingerido una gran cantidad de cianuro. Una pista muy improbable: una falla en el sobre de correo, expuso a un asesino que estaba dispuesto a matar a gente inocente.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: A la mano
programme.desc: Un oficial de policía acusado de matar a su ex esposa insiste en que ella se suicidó. Los investigadores dicen que fue un asesinato, que era físicamente imposible que la mujer se disparara.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la universitaria Jenna Verhaalen fue encontrada muerta en su departamento de Bryan, Texas y las hemorragias petequiales en sus ojos indicaron que fue estrangulada.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1981, Cassie Hansen, de 6 años, desapareció de su iglesia de Minnesota durante una misa vespertina. Después de recibir un aviso de que se vio a un hombre mayor cargando a una persona pequeña, la policía encontró el cuerpo de Cassie en un basurero.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: La noche del 22 de Mayo de 1992, Betty Wilson regresó a casa después de una reunión y descubrió a su esposo tirado en un charco de sangre. Era evidente que Jack Wilson había sido asesinado – pero ¿cómo?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2003, Kathy Lorick fue asesinada en una pista de carreras en Concord, California, en pleno día, mientras hablaba con su esposo por su teléfono móvil.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Una estudiante de último año de la universidad fue violada y asesinada cerca de un sendero sin pavimentar utilizado por los estudiantes para caminar de un lado del campus al otro.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fiebre del oro
programme.desc: El despacho de emergencia recibió una llamada de un hombre que dijo que su novia se disparó y se suicidó. La autopsia reveló que la herida de bala no fue autoinfligida.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las mujeres en una ciudad de Louisiana viven con el temor de un violador que no deja pistas sobre su identidad. Pero la tecnología y la ciencia del comportamiento se combinan para brindar a la policía una nueva herramienta forense.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Esta examinación del papel que juegan las autopsias en las investigaciones de asesinatos se centra en la sospechosa muerte de Virginia Ridley.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2002, una pequeña comunidad en el norte del estado de Nueva York quedó devastada cuando Patty Wlasiuk murió en un accidente de camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: ¿Quién fue el delincuente sexual que asesinó a dos muchachos adolescentes en Nebraska? La clave para detenerlo sería la composición única de la cuerda basura que usó para amarrar a sus víctimas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1997, se encontró el carro de Kelly Eckart, con todas sus pertenencias aún dentro del mismo, después de haber trabajado un turno nocturno en Franklin, Indiana. Días más tarde, se encontró su cuerpo en un barranco aislado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Parece que una mujer ha perdido el control de su camioneta SUV y ha caído en el barranco de un arroyo poco profundo.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico

programme.desc: Golden Boy Promotions presents a thrilling showdown at super lightweight, as Duarte faces off against Madueno.

programme.title: Boxing
programme.desc: Jake Wyllie (16-1, 5 KO) faces George Kambosos Jr. (21-3, 10 KO) on short notice in Sydney.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: DCC hopefuls try on the iconic uniform for cameos, show off their hip-hop skills for celebrity choreographer Marty Kudelka and learn table manners in an etiquette class.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: As the first football game approaches, Kelli and Judy watch tape on AT&T Stadium's famously large HD screens to see who is game day-ready -- and figure out the final cuts.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli and Judy make the emotional final cuts, dreams come true when the 2018 DCC squad is announced, and the women hit the field for their first game.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Hundreds of hopefuls arrive at AT&T Stadium to start the rigorous audition process for the Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, competing for the fewest number of open spots ever.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The 101 remaining hopefuls must master tough choreography, learn the famous DCC kick line and impress judges Melissa Rycroft and Charm La'Donna.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates give panel interviews and solo performances before the rookies and veterans face off on the field and find out who makes it to training camp.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The pressure is on at training camp as both rookie and veteran candidates give it their all in front of their toughest audience yet.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Kelli gives the ladies a tough kick line and jump-split workout, and choreographer Travis Wall teaches them a modern dance that will determine their future in the competition.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Charm La'Donna teaches the candidates a hip-hop-style routine, the judges pick their charm squad, the ladies visit the Dallas VA Medical Center and two rookies are sent home.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The candidates audition for the show group, an honorary contingent of 18 cheerleaders who represent the DCC on USO tours and TV, in front of guest judge Cheryl Burke.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: Emmy-winner Tyce Diorio teaches the ladies to bring the magic as he puts them through a tough routine. Evan Miller challenges the DCC's power and musicality.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The DCC take the field for the first time in their signature DCC boots. Learning the DCC entrance proves very challenging for some, while others struggle to get accustomed to dancing in cowboy boots. Melissa Rycroft is featured.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The recruits do media training with NBC 5 Dallas-Fort Worth lead news anchors Meredith Land, Kelli, and Judy name two triangle points, and guest judge Melissa Rycroft sits in.

programme.title: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders: Making the Team
programme.desc: The ladies put their modeling skills to the test on photoshoot day, Julia tries to bounce back after her car accident, and the dancers get a lesson in healthy cooking.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A community comes together to search for a young woman who goes missing from a Halloween party.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Authorities investigate multiple suspects when a vibrant young woman disappears on her son's fifth birthday.

programme.title: Dateline NBC

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Co-lead investigator in the Steven Avery case Tom Fassbender discusses the case and allegations investigators coerced Avery's nephew, Brendan Dassey, into making a false confession.

programme.title: Rock of Love: A Ride on the Wild Side
programme.desc: Bret wants a girl with good manual skills so he tests their aptitude with nuts and bolts in a custom motorcycle build off.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Mud Bowl II
programme.desc: The “Divine Nine” compete in the second annual Bret Michaels Mud Bowl!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Once a Cowgirl
programme.desc: For the two women who have yet to win a date with Bret, Rodeo's Rocking Rodeo could be their last chance to make a connection.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Red, White and a Little Blue
programme.desc: The remaining seven girls display their ability to rock an audience as they perform at a USO show for military veterans.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Video Vixens
programme.desc: With only six girls left in the house, tensions run high as Bret tests the girls' creativity by making them shoot, direct and edit their own music videos.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Going to Ex-tremes
programme.desc: Bret shocks the girls by inviting their exes. He takes the guys out on the town to dig up dirt on the girls.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bitter Suite
programme.desc: Bret surprises the final four with a trip to Las Vegas. One girl's lies cause Bret to question her intentions toward him.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Rockin’ the ‘Rents
programme.desc: Bret wants to know more about the three remaining girls, and what better way to get the 411 than moving their parents into the house!

programme.title: Rock of Love: Bret’s Rock of Love
programme.desc: Bret takes his final two girls south of the border to spend some quality, romantic time with each one before making his final choice.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Reunion
programme.desc: Tonight Bret and all of the girls reunite to rekindle the friendships and rivalries that made the house such a unique place.

programme.title: Rock of Love: The Clip Show
programme.desc: A look back at the outrageous and funny moments that never made the show.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Hustle on the Bustle
programme.desc: Twice unlucky in love, this time Bret Michaels leaves his mansion behind and takes twenty even more beautiful babes on tour with him to find a girlfriend who can handle his life on the road.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Fifteen Weddings And Three Funerals
programme.desc: Fifteen girls take turns reciting their own wedding vows to Bret.

programme.title: Rock of Love: Babes On Ice
programme.desc: Bret is looking for a woman with maternal instincts, so he puts his twelve girls in ice skates to see how well they protect “Baby Bret” against the University of Illinois Women's Hockey Team and special guest player, Lacey.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: With 26 sealed briefcases full of varying amounts of cash, ranging from a penny to $1m – contestants decide whether to accept an offer of cash from ‘the Banker,’ in exchange for what might be contained in the contestant’s chosen briefcase.

programme.title: Deal or No Deal
programme.desc: The contestant picks one case which is theirs to keep. As each of the 25 cases is opened, the likelihood of the player having a valuable cash amount in their case decreases or increases, with ‘the Banker’ tempting the player throughout the game.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Peter, hoping to join the Spirit Squad, links Darcy’s personal web page to his. Darcy is thrilled with all the attention and hits she gets, and even posts some racy pictures of the Spirit Squad.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Darcy’s online admirers take up more and more of her time, and her relationship with Spinner suffers. As Darcy posts increasingly sexy photos of herself, she’s surprised when her favourite online fan decides to introduce himself.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After Career Aptitude test results come in, Spinner is less than pleased with his results, and in desperation, convinces Jimmy to go into business selling T-shirts adorned with Jimmy’s illustrations.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After being released from jail, Sean finds himself sleeping on Spike & Snake’s couch. Sean is focusing on putting the last few months behind him, getting a great job and being a fantastic boyfriend to Emma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Craig’s back in town for a music festival – and Manny can’t help picking up right where they left off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie thinks all Craig’s bad behaviour is due to Manny – to help him, she’s determined to stay by his side while he’s in town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s intent on getting over Craig, and uses Liberty’s upcoming birthday as an excuse to throw a party at Emma’s house while Spike and Snake are out of town.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: In shock after over JT’s death, Toby turns to Liberty, convinced that his somber funeral isn’t what JT would’ve wanted. Liberty agrees, and the two grief-stricken friends plan to throw a celebratory memorial for JT at Degrassi.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s parents want her to come home after the tragedy at Emma’s house – and to Emma’s surprise, Manny agrees.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After a spectacular panic attack during a midterm exam, Paige’s professor at Banting offers her one more chance – which comes in the form of a ton of work to be completed over the holiday weekend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: With her degree in jeopardy thanks to her failing grades, and the little issue of a dramatic dorm fire, Paige develops a Banting allergy. She slinks home to Toronto with her tail between her legs – but nobody can know the truth about what happened.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige has one goal: to return to her former pre-Banting glory. She’s going to get back to doing what she does best. Everything – and that includes dating. Paige surprises Spinner by asking him out. Nothing serious, just casual.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco’s at loose ends with Dylan gone and nothing seems exciting. He and Spinner decide a spring break road trip will break the monotony – but cash is the key.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex and her mother Emily are in trouble - Chad, Emily's boyfriend, has run up thousands of dollars in credit card debt and hasn't been paying the rent.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Alex's double life is finally bringing in the cash she wants but hiding everything from everyone is taking a toll on her schoolwork and her connection with Paige.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: The corridors of Degrassi have become a pressure cooker. With an unexpected influx of students from Lakehurst, Degrassi students find themselves facing old enemies and new friends.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Abstinence-pledged Darcy wakes up in a strange bed, screamingly hung-over. Panic-stricken, she tries to piece together the events of the night before. She knows – physically – she had sex, but everything else is a blank.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Paige is ecstatic to have landed herself a gig in the fashion world. If everything goes well, this could turn itself into a brand new career path.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: After seeing Craig’s newly released album on the shelves at the record store, Ashley decides to pursue her own music – starting with a performance at the Lakehurst-Degrassi talent mixer.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Amidst the crowded classrooms and the battle for school territory, tensions between Lakehurst and Degrassi students continue to mount. But Spinner’s got his eye on enemy territory -- the adorably tough new Lakehurst girl, Jane.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Faced with his own aggression and looming mortality, Spinner attempts to prove his ‘masculinity’ by kicking an unnecessary amount of Lakehurst ass.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Manny’s moved back home but the honeymoon between she and her parents is just about over. And when her dad insists she have a traditional “Debut” – the lavish party many Filipino girls have for their 18th birthday – Manny takes a stand.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Ellie’s ex-mentor Caitlin Ryan arrives to do a guest lecture series in Jesse’s class and Ellie sees her opportunity to set herself apart from her peers. She throws herself into Caitlin’s class assignment and her hard work quickly pays off.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Emma decides she’ll do what it takes to get back on track, starting by rekindling her friendship with Manny, but when Manny wants to hit an audition to be a ‘Purple Dragon’ sports drink model, Emma finds herself quickly at odds with her best friend.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Spinner deals with chemo, timing how long he can go between barf-buckets, while his cheerleader Jane, tries to bring the party to him.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Marco and Ellie’s retail therapy goes awry when Marco finds his credit card maxed out. Ellie rescues him this time, but Marco realizes a new job is the real solution—and might even give him the opportunity to meet new people.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Roofie rape victim Darcy is barreling down a self-destructive path and only a handful of people know why.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation
programme.desc: Rick decides to get back at his bullies, hitting them right where it hurts – their cars. But when Jimmy becomes a member of the “Whack Your Brain” team, the two form a truce.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Starting in Uruk, the `mother of all cities', in southern Iraq, Richard travels to Syria, Egypt, Anatolia and Greece, tracing the birth and development of technology and culture.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard looks at the winners and losers of the great Bronze Age collapse, and the new powers that emerged in the harder-edged Age of Iron.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Richard Miles explores the power and the paradox of the `Greek Thing', a blossoming in art, philosophy and science that went hand-in-hand with political discord, social injustice and endless war.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: In Richard Miles's epic story of civilisation, there have been plenty of examples of the great men of history, but none came close to the legend of Alexander of Macedon, known as `the Great'.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: Archaeologist and historian Richard Miles examines the phenomenon of the Roman Republic, from its fratricidal mythical beginnings, with the legend of Romulus and Remus, to the all too real violence of its end.

programme.title: Ancient Worlds
programme.desc: The material benefits of the `good order' delivered by Roman rule provided its citizens and subjects with the security to ask profound questions about the meaning of life, questions that the Roman belief system was ill-equipped to answer.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles presents a series charting the history of the breakthroughs and watersheds in our long quest to understand our ancient past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Archaeologist Richard Miles shows how discoveries in the 18th and 19th centuries overturned ideas of when and where civilisation began, as empires competed to `own' the past.

programme.title: Archaeology: A Secret History
programme.desc: Richard Miles shows how 20th-century attention turned from civilisation and kings to the search for the common man against a background of science and competing political ideologies.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The life of the first reptilian carnivores on Earth, told through computer animation.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: The Jurassic period saw the advent of the largest and strongest dinosaurs that ever roamed the Earth.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: A look at the world as it was 149 million years ago - in the late Jurassic Period. The old continents have broken up and much of the land is under water. Huge shallow seas have supported a revolution in marine life.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: With wings longer than those of a small plane, pterosaurs were the largest creatures ever known to have flown.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: This programme looks at the Cretaceous period, 106 million years ago. Volcanic activity forces the continents apart, and dinosaurs diversify into a range of species to cope with environmental extremes.

programme.title: Walking with Dinosaurs
programme.desc: It is the late Cretaceous period and Tyrannosaurus rex is the top predator, but the Earth is poisoned by volcanic activity and a comet strikes.

programme.desc: An Australian shepherd/pit bull mix with severe aggression issues; a boxer's owners are concerned by her tendency to jump the six-foot backyard fence.

programme.desc: Cesar helps a man get over a fear of dogs so he can finally fulfill his children's request to adopt one of their own.

programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier who became aggressive after going blind; a spoiled Pekingese/miniature poodle mix; a Rottweiler with a dangerous obsession with the horses on the ranch where she lives.

programme.desc: A Yorkshire terrier barks too much; a once-shy German shepherd becomes aggressive; a shepherd mix has a whining problem.

programme.title: Dog Whisperer
programme.desc: Cesar tries to help an aggressive Shiba Inu from Japan and meets a wire fox terrier who has a fixation with a riding lawn-mower.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: For months, this fugitive has been stringing Leland along with a series of barely believable excuses. Out of patience, Leland calls in the Big Dog. The team whole team heads out to put pressure on the family and friends of the fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's latest quarry is running from abuse and assault charges. As Dog investigates, he discovers that this fugitive has gamed the system by jumping from one bond, and one bondsman, to another.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: When the co-signer of a bond is also romantically involved with the defendant, sometimes the bondman is put in the middle of a lover's quarrel.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is in Denver helping Bobby Brown to track down a fugitive with a long rap sheet. But, unfortunately, they have no picture of the felon to work with, so the challenges are big on this one. But, Dog discovers a new source; "Facebook".

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Back in Colorado, Dog's on the hunt for a runner with more than a decade's worth of trouble with the law. But the fugitive's friends and family are reluctant to help Dog bring him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: After releasing the second part of his autobiography, Dog and his family traveled across America, and this very special episode offers an intimate portrait of both the public and private moments of that journey.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is back in Colorado chasing a young man with a taste for trouble. He's fled to Texas but with his family's house on the line Dog is willing to try a risky strategy.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today's hunt takes Dog far from the glittering hotels of Waikiki to the parts of Hawaii tourist rarely see, Oahu's ramshackle tent cities. The team searches for a woman who has lost almost everything, her home, her family and her spirit.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's good friend and fellow bondsman Chris is running out of time. He has only days to find his fugitive or risk losing his business. In his hunt, Dog confronts duplicitous tipsters, vicious attack dogs, and hostile neighbors.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The bounty-hunter adventures of Duane "Dog" Chapman and his Posse are chronicled in this one hour "Best Of" special, featuring superlative memorable moments from the previous seven seasons.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog launches a high stake hunt through the desolate and dangerous mountain landscape of western Colorado in pursuit of a gun-loving survivalist with a million dollar bond on his head. Will Dog's plan of using brains over brawn work?

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Once in Montrose, Dog discovers that the million dollar fugitive is not the young bondsman's only problem. Dog and Beth make it their mission to both clean up the mess and teach him the fundamentals of bondsmanship.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is committed to saving his new friend's bail bonding business, and now must race against time to bring a rogues' gallery to justice in the High Sierra mountain town of Montrose, CO.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With four outlaws still on the lam, Dog sets out to bring 'em in. As day turns into night and with the darkness and the danger mounting, an undaunted Dog and team plan late night hits on the riskiest of locations--their targets' homes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: With a long record of violence and abuse and weighing in at over 200lbs, Dog's target for the day does not sound like a gentle giant. When the trail grows cold, Dog turns up the heat on the fugitive's brother and sister.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: In Seattle, Jeff and Blake learn the woman who died in the plane crash with Peter DeVilbis cannot be positively identified, but the ring she was wearing is indeed Fallon's wedding band. Back in Denver, Fallon's moving funeral is held.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake visits Dominique at La Mirage to discuss her recent revelation. She tells Blake that her mother was a long-time mistress of his father and has evidence to prove it. At Alexis' trial, a neighbor offers powerful evidence that incriminates Alexis.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: On the witness stand, Steven testified he saw Alexis push Mark to his death. Jeff sees other women in an attempt to forget Fallon but remains obsessed with his ex-wife. Alexis takes the stand and testifies.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Adam and Dex vow to prove Alexis' innocence and begin a determined campaign. The woman who testified she had seen Alexis on the terrace with Mark had hosted a party that evening and snapped photographs.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Amanda insists Alexis acknowledge their relationship and begs her to reveal her father's identity. Alexis tells her it was simply an anonymous ski instructor in Gstaad. Steven and Alexis reconcile.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake offers to help Amanda find her father. Claudia goes out with Dean to dinner, while Steven rejects Luke. Jeff ends up sleeping with Nicole. Dominique goes to Istanbul to meet with Rashid Ahmed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle goes into premature labor and delivers a baby girl, who suffers from respiratory problems. She names the child Kristina after a friend who once saved her life. Claudia is uneasy when Steven accompanies Luke on a business trip.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Upon learning that he may be Amanda's father, Blake resolves to ask Amanda to take a blood test. Nicole tells Jeff there's a chance Peter DeVilbis may have been with another woman at the time of the crash.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake buys back his racehorse Allegre from owner Daniel Reece, who sends Krystle a gift. Furious, she demands to know how he dared approach her after what happened with her sister, Iris. Amanda learns she is Blake's daughter.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle reconciles with Daniel, who reveals that his break-up with her sister was amicable. Claudia moves into La Mirage. Krystle confides to Steven that Daniel is Sammy Jo's father and therefore little Danny's grandfather.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Claudia rebuffs Steven's conciliatory attempts. Tension between Dex and Amanda continues to mount. On his deathbed, Tom Carrington makes amends with Blake, and in a final dramatic gesture, has his will changed.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle begins working with Daniel. Blake is adamantly opposed and exchanges harsh words with Reece. Dex is furious with Alexis for traveling to Sumatra to see Blake's father. Alexis learns from Amanda about Dex's experience with Daniel in Vietnam.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Krystle launches her new business with the purchase of an Arabian horse. Sexual tension between Steven and Luke mounts. Jeff and Nikki return from Bolivia with the news of their marriage and they move into the mansion.

programme.title: Dynasty
programme.desc: Blake returns triumphant from his negotiations with the Chinese. Alexis vows to buy into the venture. Krystle, uncomfortable with Daniel's increasing attention, avoids him. Blake invites Amanda to accompany him on a business trip to Acapulco.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In this classic episode of Forensic Files, the longest-running true crime series in television history, a serial bomber targets a judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1990, Shirley Andronowich's body was found mutilated. Eyewitnesses told police she had a fight with her husband the night before, but forensic evidence proved that he had nothing to do with her death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman suddenly becomes critically ill, eventually leaving her unable to walk. A bone marrow test reveals the cause: arsenic poisoning. Investigators must determine if the poisoning was caused by groundwater contamination or something sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After the suspect was convicted of arson and murder, he maintained his innocence. He turned to law books in the prison library and set out to prove his innocence.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: This killer probably hoped to cover his tracks by staging the crime scene. But investigators saw through the attempt almost immediately and turned to forensic science to learn what really happened that night.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Between 1985 and 1988, 18 people were choked, molested and left for dead in the remote mountains of California. The only witnesses were the insects — and they play an important role in solving the crimes and bringing the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Two sets of scientists probe a woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a successful stockbroker doesn't return home after a late shift, his wife reports him missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: For 15 months, a serial killer was strangling prostitutes in Florida, then taunting police by leaving the bodies in plain sight. The only clues were a tire impression and some threads.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1999, Susan Fassett was gunned down as she left her church choir practice in Poughkeepsie, NY. After clearing her husband, police turned their attention to Fred Andros, with whom Susan had an affair.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder trail turned cold, until police got a call from a woman whose husband, Gerald Powers, had a criminal past and a fondness for Chevy Berettas.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In the summer of 1986, Kathleen Lipscomb's body was found on a deserted road outside of San Antonio. Months and years passed, but the crime was never solved. Finally, a private investigator discovered Kathleen's diary.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When a young fireman died from what appeared to be serious but undiagnosed heart disease, his family and friends had no proof of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A young woman attends evening church services, then disappears. When her abandoned car is found, the tank is empty and a gas can she kept in her trunk for emergencies is missing.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Three seemingly unrelated deaths prove to be serial murders. The killer had been careful; he used poison which had no taste or odor. Fortunately for investigators, it also had a unique chemical signature.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A murder investigation in Florida crosses jurisdictions from New York and Jamaica. The police rely on cell phone mapping, wiretapping and a host of forensic evidence to link a suspect to a murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 2005, the body of young mother Summer Baldwin was found in a suitcase in a Texas landfill.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A 13-year-old girl went missing from her Colorado home. The only evidence the kidnapper left behind was three fingerprints on a window screen.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: A human skeleton was discovered in the North Carolina marshlands. When investigators learned she'd been dead for 18 months, they knew it would be difficult to find out who she was, let alone who killed her.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Women in a Louisiana city live in fear of a rapist who leaves no clues to his identity. But technology and behavioral science combine to give police a new forensic tool. Police narrow their search to one man: local policeman Randy Comeaux.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1992, Laura Houghteling disappeared from her Bethesda home and was never seen again. Forensic scientists use evidence from her bedroom to direct police to a prime suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: When police in the Great Plains are called about a dead body, a background check on the victim leads them into a bizarre web of homeless drifters, cattle auctions and bad checks — all fronted by elderly couple Ray and Faye Copeland.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Armed with little else, police hoped that shoe impressions found at a Lansing, Michigan crime scene would put their investigation of Audrey Nichols' murder back on track.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: After a street fight takes the life of a national wrestling champion, police must determine if he was killed in cold blood or in self-defense.

programme.title: Forensic Files

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: In 1989, 4-year-old April Loveless was found dead in the backyard of her Texas home. Her parents told police that she was attacked and killed by wild dogs. Investigators did not agree.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After another victorious battle against Camille's monsters, the Rangers feel they are unstoppable. RJ warns them about being overconfident. He tells them to train on their basic stances.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: Everyone is still making fun of Lily for being too nice. After a battle with Porcupongo, Lily is fed up with being so nice and shows her bad side. Lily becomes a rude customer at JKP and refuses to help the other Rangers.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury
programme.desc: After his last battle with Dai Shi, RJ has major problems controlling his animal spirit. He turns into a werewolf and becomes a big threat to anyone around him. RJ learns to lean on his friends and not run away from them when he has a problem.

programme.desc: Casey really has grown up from being a cub at Pai Zhuq. He's taken initiative and stepped up to being the leader of the group. But now with RJ as a Ranger, things are a little different. Casey feels like a cub all over again.

programme.title: Power Rangers: Jungle Fury

programme.desc: Lucy plays the dominant parent role in their son's life. Realizing that he needs to spend more time with his son, Ricky agrees to spend his vacation at home to care for little Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky's thirteenth anniversary is rapidly approaching. In an outward show of affection, they buy each other gifts—golf clubs for Ricky and fur for Lucy.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: A algunas personas no les importa a quién matan, solo quieren herir a gente inocente. Estos asesinos son los más difíciles de atrapar porque no tienen conexión con sus víctimas.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: En casos de asesinatos, a veces las víctimas dan las únicas pistas del asesino. Los antropólogos forenses utilizan restos óseos para descifrar las pistas escritas en los huesos.

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives
programme.desc: Para los investigadores de homicidios, es una carrera contra el tiempo rastrear a su adversario más mortal: un asesino en serie para quien matar es la única manera de sentirse vivo.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI
